title: Verify retention, abandonment, and cleanup
preconditions: Referenced and unreferenced drafts, evaluations, rule versions, apply results, feedback, recognized temporaries, hostile links, and crash orphans exist.
steps: Inspect retained provenance; abandon unreferenced work; attempt hard removal of referenced history; run cleanup after success, failure, crash, and startup; inspect paths and safe result.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-STATE-RETENTION-CLEANUP holds: required history remains, removable derived payload disappears, referenced history rejects deletion, and cleanup never escapes CLASSIFY storage.
